name: nostics
description: Structured diagnostic code library for JavaScript/TypeScript. Turns errors into typed, machine-readable Diagnostic instances with stable codes, docs URLs, and actionable fixes. Covers defineDiagnostics, reporters, formatters, Vite plugins, and adding new diagnostic codes.

interface.shortDescription: Structured diagnostic code library for JavaScript/TypeScript
interface.longDescription: Structured diagnostic code library for JavaScript/TypeScript. Turns errors into typed, machine-readable Diagnostic instances with stable codes, docs URLs, and actionable fixes. Covers defineDiagnostics, reporters, formatters, Vite plugins, and adding new diagnostic codes.
defaultPrompt: Help me use Nostics for my current task.
